transcript: Sari kata oleh SDI Media Jumpa lagi, Dr. Ken. Saya mempunyai impian besar untuk anda. Saya mahu memberi anda peluang yang saya tak pernah miliki. Dan tidak ada masa untuk bermain permainan. Saya tidak tahu mengapa saya tidak melihatnya sebelum ini. Apa yang anda perlukan Ia adalah I don't know why I didn't see it before What you really needed Was me Wait, wait, wait I know all you ever wanted Was to hear me telling you What's the highest score? How proud I am to have a son Can you get 80? Like you But 80 is still 8 You cannot get 96, man Terima kasih kerana menonton! Bagaimana saya bangga untuk mempunyai anak lelaki. Bolehkah anda mendapat 80? Seperti anda. Tetapi 80 masih 8. Anda tidak boleh mendapat 96, bukan? Semua adalah kesilapan yang dungu. Anda berhati-hati untuk saya peduli. Saya tidak pernah tanya apa yang anda mahukan. Jadi, jangan buat suara. Beri saya stik. Beri saya stik sekarang. Dan walaupun anda beritahu saya, So later, don't make noise. Give me the stick. Give me the stick now. And even when you told me, I would not have listened. Why do you have to do all this stuff? That is my choice. It is not your choice, young man. You never listen to me. You keep quiet as long as you are with me. It is my choice. And it is my choice only. I've made many mistakes as a father. But I hope you see that I've loved you always. Because I am your father. And you forever will be my son. Sari kata oleh SDI Media Terima kasih kerana menonton! Where are you going? Where's the camp? It's in Kajang Come, let me drive you there I hope you know That everything I do Is for you

It is my choice. And it is my choice only.

I've made many mistakes as a father. But I hope you see that I've loved you always. Because I am your father. And you forever will be my son. Sari kata oleh SDI Media Terima kasih kerana menonton! Where are you going? Where's the camp? It's in Kajang Come, let me drive you there I hope you know
